items.scenario: You volunteer at a neighborhood tool-lending library that just moved most of its checkouts to a new mobile app. Several regular borrowers have found the app confusing, and turnout at the last two open hours has dropped noticeably.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Hartley. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the problems borrowers are having with the new app
Explain how the change has affected attendance
Suggest a way to help borrowers adjust
items.subject: Trouble with the new tool-library app

items.scenario: You recently began a part-time internship at a landscape architecture studio. Your supervisor asked you to shadow the design team, but your first week has been spent entirely on filing, and you are eager to start learning the actual work.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Delacroix. In your email, do the following:
goals: Thank your supervisor for the internship opportunity
Explain what you had hoped to learn this month
Ask whether you can join the design team's next project
items.subject: Getting more involved with the design team

items.scenario: You moved into a furnished studio three weeks ago, and the building's only elevator has been out of service since last Friday. You live on the sixth floor, and carrying groceries and laundry up the stairs has become a real strain.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Trent. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe how long the elevator has been out of service
Explain how the outage is affecting you
Ask when the repair will be finished
items.subject: Sixth-floor access while the elevator is down

items.scenario: You signed up for a weekend watercolor workshop at a community art studio. The confirmation email lists a start time of 9 a.m., but the studio's website and printed flyer both say 10 a.m., and you are not sure which is correct.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Halloway. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the conflicting start times you received
items.subject: Conflicting start times for the watercolor workshop
